TSN Industrial Archive

Manufacturing Data Terminal

Each channel loads the production schematics cleared for a specific AMC class and traces every visible dependency in that band.

Lower AMC channels halt when a dependency exceeds channel clearance. Use Show All to unlock the full archive, then drag across the schematic board to inspect each chain.

Terminal // MFG-DATACORE-7
Archive Sync: LiveSource: TSN DB
Galactic MapShip Library
43Tracked Outputs
12Raw Extractions
2External Feeds
19IAMC Cross-Cert
57Indexed Nodes
AMC CAMC 1AMC 2AMC 3AMC IRaw ResourceExternal ChainAlso in IAMC

Signature Index

Cross-Signature Query

Query the full manufacturing archive by one or more signature channels, then review each matching item as a terminal card with icon, size, linked schematics, and companion signatures.

Archive scope: All Tiers

Choose one or more signatures from the full dataset. Each additional signature narrows the list to items that match every selected signature.

Filter Lock

Select one or more signature channels to query the archive.

Schematic Bank

Tiered Production Channels

Switch AMC channels to compare which branches remain manufacturable, which dependencies fall back to raw extraction, and which routes leave the archive entirely.

AMC C Channel
